allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial vault setup — FactoryLM_OS Obsidian operating brain

Complete vault structure with numbered folders \(00-10\), templates,
global references \(Dashboard, Tags, Commands, Background\), and
CLAUDE_TONY.md instruction file for Tony_Macaroni agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(gh repo create Mikecranesync/FactoryLM_OS --public --description "FactoryLM operating brain — Obsidian vault for industrial IoT platform development" --source . --remote origin --push 2>&1)
Bash(doppler secrets get GITHUB_PAT --project factorylm --config prd --plain 2>&1 | gh secret set VAULT_PAT -R Mikecranesync/factorylm 2>&1)
Bash(git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ stash && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ checkout main && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ pull origin main)

Bash(git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ add .github/workflows/commit-notes-to-vault.yml && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ci: add commit-notes-to-vault GitHub Action

Generates markdown commit digests on push to main and pushes them
to FactoryLM_OS/10_Commit_Notes/ for the Obsidian vault.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ checkout -b ci/commit-notes-to-vault && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ci: add commit-notes-to-vault GitHub Action

Generates markdown commit digests on push to main and pushes them
to FactoryLM_OS/10_Commit_Notes/ for the Obsidian vault.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ checkout fix/bridge-default-port && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ stash pop 2>&12)

Bash(gh api repos/Mikecranesync/factorylm/actions/runs/22386634205/jobs 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(j['name'],j['conclusion'],j.get\('started_at',''\),j.get\('completed_at',''\)\) for j in data.get\('jobs',[]\)]")
Bash(git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ fetch origin main && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ show origin/main:.github/workflows/commit-notes-to-vault.yml 2>&1)
Bash(gh api repos/Mikecranesync/factorylm/rulesets 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(r['name'],r['enforcement'],r.get\('target',''\)\) for r in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]" 2>&1)
Bash(gh workflow run commit-notes-to-vault.yml -R Mikecranesync/factorylm --ref main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /Users/factorylm/factorylm && git add .github/workflows/commit-notes-to-vault.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ci: add workflow_dispatch trigger to commit-notes workflow

Allows manual triggering for testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create -R Mikecranesync/factorylm --title "ci: add workflow_dispatch to commit-notes workflow" --body "Adds manual trigger for testing. Also triggers the push-to-main action on merge." --base main --head ci/workflow-dispatch 2>&1)
Bash(gh api /users/Mikecranesync 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('plan',{}\)\)" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /Users/factorylm/factorylm && git checkout -b ci/fix-workflow-yaml && git add .github/workflows/commit-notes-to-vault.yml && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ci: fix commit-notes workflow YAML parsing

Replace heredocs with echo/printf to avoid unindented lines \(especially
`---` frontmatter\) breaking the YAML block scalar. Move github context
vars to env to avoid expression interpolation issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create -R Mikecranesync/factorylm --title "ci: fix commit-notes workflow YAML parsing" --body "Heredoc content with \\`---\\` at column 0 broke the YAML block scalar. Replaced with echo/printf." --base main --head ci/fix-workflow-yaml 2>&1)
Bash(git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ checkout fix/bridge-default-port && git -C /Users/factorylm/factorylm/ stash pop 2>&1)

Bash(mkdir -p /Users/factorylm/FactoryLM_OS/.obsidian/plugins/dataview && cd /Users/factorylm/FactoryLM_OS/.obsidian/plugins/dataview && gh release download --repo blacksmithgu/obsidian-dataview --pattern 'main.js' --pattern 'manifest.json' --pattern 'styles.css' --clobber 2>&1)

Bash(mkdir -p /Users/factorylm/FactoryLM_OS/.obsidian/plugins/templater-obsidian && cd /Users/factorylm/FactoryLM_OS/.obsidian/plugins/templater-obsidian && gh release download --repo SilentVoid13/Templater --pattern 'main.js' --pattern 'manifest.json' --pattern 'styles.css' --clobber 2>&1)
